mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_share_link ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_share_link (document_id, token, password, expire_time, create_user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{token}, #{password}, #{expireTime}, #{createUserId}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_share_link SET password = #{password}, expire_time = #{expireTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_share_link WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
